description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named msvc that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix job that runs on both windows-2019 and windows-latest, with two included configurations for msvc-2019-x86 and msvc-2019-amd64. For each configuration, check out the repository, set up Python 3.x, install msvc-dev-cmd, upgrade meson, ninja, and fonttools with pip, build the project with meson, and run tests with meson test.
